mapper.select:
SELECT BBPM.BB_PRODUCT_CODE, BBPM.BB_PRODUCT_NAME, CASE WHEN BBPM.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '1' THEN BBPM.BB_LOT_ISSUE_PRICE WHEN BBPM.BB_GESTURE_VALUE = '2' THEN MIPB.PRICE END AS BB_LOT_ISSUE_PRICE, BBPM.BB_STOCK, DECODE(BBPM.BB_UNIT_KBN, '1', '株', '2', '円', '3', '口', '株') AS BB_UNIT_KBN, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIPB.BB_PERIOD_FROM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD'), ' ') AS BB_PERIOD_FROM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIPB.BB_PERIOD_TO, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS BB_PERIOD_TO, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIPB.PAYMENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS PAYMENT_DATE, BBPM.BB_SETTLE_DATE,
MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AS BB_BRANCH_CODE, MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MUAI.NAME_KANJI AS BB_USER_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MUAI.OPEN_ACCT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS OPEN_ACCT_DATE, TRIM(MUAI.UAI_OCCUPATION) AS UAI_OCCUPATION, CASE WHEN MUAI.CORPORATION_KBN = '0' THEN MUAI.UAI_OFFICE_NAME WHEN MUAI.CORPORATION_KBN = '1' THEN '-' END AS UAI_OFFICE_NAME, MUAI.TC_COMP_RANK, TRIM(MUAI.UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN) AS UAI_QA_INVESTMENT_PLAN, TO_NUMBER(NVL(MUAI.UAI_EXP_STOCK, 0)) AS UAI_EXP_STOCK, CASE WHEN MUAI.CORPORATION_KBN = '0' THEN MUAI.UAI_QA_FINANCIAL_ASSETS WHEN MUAI.CORPORATION_KBN = '1' THEN '-' END AS UAI_QA_FINANCIAL_ASSETS, NVL(ICM.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, 0) AS SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, NVL(ICM.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO, 10) AS MAS_SAIRYOU_ALLO,
CASE WHEN TIPO.LOTTERY_RESULT IS NOT NULL THEN TIPO.LOTTERY_RESULT
WHEN BA.BB_WINNING = '2' AND BA.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN '4'
WHEN BA.BB_WINNING = '2' AND BA.BB_EXCLUSION <> '4' THEN '2' ELSE BA.BB_WINNING END AS LOTTERY_RESULT, CASE
WHEN TIPO.LOTTERY_RESULT IN ('1','3','4','5') THEN NVL(TIPO.QUANTITY_ALLOC, 0) || ''
WHEN TIPO.LOTTERY_RESULT = '2' THEN '0'
WHEN BA.BB_WINNING = '0' THEN '-'
WHEN BA.BB_WINNING = '1' THEN BA.BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC || ''
WHEN BA.BB_WINNING = '2' AND BA.BB_EXCLUSION = '4' THEN NVL(SA.QUANTITY_SAIRYOU, 0) || '' ELSE '0' END AS BB_QUANTITY_ALLOC, BA.BB_QUANTITY, NVL(TIPO.ORDER_STATUS, '0') AS ORDER_STATUS, TO_CHAR(TIPO.ORDER_TIME, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') AS ORDER_TIME, TIPO.ORDER_COUNT, TIPO.APPOINT_PRICE, TIPO.DEPOSIT_TYPE, TIPO.INVITATION_TYPE AS INVITATION, TIPO.ORDER_METHOD, TIPO.PROSPECTUS, TIPO.EXPLANATION_INFO AS EXPLANATION, TIPO.WARNING_APPLY, BA.BB_REMARK,
BA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AS BB_PRODUCT_CODE_H, MUAI.BUTEN_CODE AS BB_BRANCH_CODE_H, MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER_H, TIPO.ORDER_COUNT AS ORDER_COUNT_H, MUAI.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID, BBPM.BB_SETTLE_DATE AS BB_SETTLE_DATE_H, BA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AS BB_PRESENTATION_FROM_H, MUAI.BROKER_CODE AS BROKER_CODE_H, MUAI.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD AS INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD_H, MUAI.DEALER_NUMBER AS DEALER_NUMBER_H, MIPB.PRESENTATION_DATE AS PRESENTATION_DATE_H, MIPB.MAX_ALLOCATION AS MAX_ALLOCATION, BA.BB_REMARK AS BB_REMARK_H, MIPB.ATTACHED_BRAND AS ATTACHED_BRAND, MUAI.UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN AS UAI_SPECIFIC_KBN, MUAI.UAI_ISA_CONTRACT_KBN AS UAI_ISA_CONTRACT_KBN, MUAI.UAI_ISA_BUY_CURRENT_YEAR_KBN AS UAI_ISA_BUY_CURRENT_YEAR_KBN, TO_CHAR(TIPO.UPDATE_TIME, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') AS UPDATE_TIME_H, TO_CHAR(BA.BB_UPDATE_DATE, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') AS BB_UPDATE_DATE, NVL2(JAIM.BUTEN_CODE, '1', '0') AS JRNISA_KBN, NVL2(SAP.ACCT_ID, '1', '0') AS TMNISA_KBN FROM ETINTRA.BB_ACCEPT BA LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER BBPM ON BA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = BBPM.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND BA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_CHAR(BBPM.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') LEFT JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(BA.BB_BRANCH_CODE, 1, 3) AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(BA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) AND MUAI.TC_COMP_RANK <> 'Z' LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER ICM ON TO_CHAR(ICM.ANNUAL, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') - CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AND BA.BB_BRANCH_CODE = ICM.BRANCH_NO AND TO_NUMBER(BA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(ICM.ACCOUNT_NO) LEFT JOIN T_IPO_PO_ORDER TIPO ON BA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = TIPO.PRODUCT_CODE AND BA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TIPO.PRESENTATION_FROM AND SUBSTR(BA.BB_BRANCH_CODE,1,3) = TIPO.BUTEN_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(BA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TIPO.ACCOUNT_NUMBER LEFT JOIN M_IPO_PO_BB_PERIOD MIPB ON BA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = MIPB.PRODUCT_CODE AND BA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = MIPB.PRESENTATION_FROM LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT SA ON BA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = SA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND BA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = SA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM AND BA.BB_BRANCH_CODE = SA.BB_BRANCH_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(BA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(SA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN ETRADE.JNISA_ACCOUNT_INFO@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD JAIM ON SUBSTR(BA.BB_BRANCH_CODE,1,3) = JAIM.BUTEN_CODE AND TO_NUMBER(BA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(JAIM.ACCOUNT_NUMBER) LEFT JOIN SVC_ACCT_PROFILE SAP ON SAP.ACCT_ID = MUAI.BUTEN_CODE || '-' || LPAD(MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, 7, '0') AND SAP.PROFILE_NAME = 'IsaOpenSelect_s_stage' AND SAP.PROFILE_VALUE = 'OpenTUMINISA' WHERE BA.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{bbProductCode} AND BA.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = #{bbPresentationFrom} AND BA.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{bbBranchCode}, 4, ' ') AND TO_NUMBER(BA.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(LPAD(#{bbAccountNumber}, 7, '0'))

SELECT SUM(ORDER_COUNT) AS ORDER_COUNT FROM T_IPO_PO_ORDER TIPO WHERE TIPO.PRODUCT_CODE = #{bbProductCode} AND TIPO.PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{bbPresentationFrom}) AND TIPO.ORDER_STATUS IN ('1', '2', '3')

SELECT 1 FROM T_IPO_PO_ORDER WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{param.bbProductCodeH} AND PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbPresentationFromH}) AND BUTEN_CODE = #{param.bbBranchCodeH} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{param.bbAccountNumberH}) AND TO_CHAR(UPDATE_TIME, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') = #{param.updateTimeH}
